creator: anders@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have a pending Varnish 3 update. But lots of users are still on Varnish 2, and I don't know how long this will continue and if there will be any support for the old Varnish 2 versions. Just to be safe, I want to repo-copy ports/www/varnish to ports/www/varnish2. Once done I will update ports/www/varnish to version 3 as according to the committers guide guidelines.

Fix: 

Repo-copy.
How-To-Repeat: Update ports/www/varnish, ignore users using Varnish 2. :-)
